cases.name: W3S view-call probe
cases.comment: Debug variant: deploy W3S and then call ticketPrice() (a simple view). Used to confirm whether the 0-weight dry-run seen on grantRole is a contract-logic issue or a state-sync/timing issue.

inputs.comment: Deploy W3S with a 1 wei ticket price and a dummy x25519 public key.
Call ticketPrice() — simple view call, no storage writes, no auth checks. If dry-run still shows weight_consumed=0 here, the issue is not contract logic.
